open_items.description: Before the first live execution cycle proceeds, verify that the pilot's scope boundaries (what the agent may and may not act on), success criteria, and rollback conditions are explicitly documented and agreed upon by all relevant stakeholders. This is a prerequisite for safe autonomous operation.
open_items.title: Confirm autonomy pilot scope boundaries and success criteria

input.response: Pilot wake seeded. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved as an open item: confirming that the autonomy pilot's scope boundaries and success criteria are explicitly documented and agreed upon before the first live execution cycle begins. A single follow-up wake has been scheduled to resolve this item, pulling the designated recall record for context. Standing by for the next cycle.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve open item pilot-scope-confirmation-001: retrieve and review documented autonomy pilot scope boundaries, success criteria, and rollback conditions to confirm readiness for first live execution cycle.
